title: conyza lateralis
intro: Conyza lateralis, also known as Mexican daisy or small fleabane, is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family and is native to Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful for treating wounds, infections, and skin conditions. Conyza lateralis has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating digestive problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
